title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Lulu Hypermarket India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Lulu Hypermarket India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Lulu Hypermarket India in Raipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Lulu Hypermarket India:
Lulu Hypermarket India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lulu Hypermarket India!
